# Omniscient AI

> Melbourne-based, vendor-neutral enterprise AI consultants serving all of Australia. One offer: the Omniscient Core — a sovereign, on-premises AI appliance (local open-weight models, agent workflows, open-source software estate, default-deny egress, tamper-evident audit ledger) delivered through a consult → build → measure engagement. Fixed-cost lease commercial model instead of per-seat/per-token pricing. "Solutions, not seminars."

Key facts
- Location: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia; deploys Australia-wide
- Contact: enquiries@omniscientai.io
- Positioning: working systems installed on the client's premises, measured against the client's own bills — not workshops or slideware
- Data stance: on-premises, single-tenant, no inbound internet path; a single default-deny egress broker allows only consented model burst and signed update pulls; both can be disabled
- Commercial model: 3-year appliance lease + Sovereignty Subscription (signed updates, patching, maintained AU compliance pack, support) + optional professional services
- Typical illustrative economics (from the public value model, USD, editable): ~US$222K all-in over 3 years for a Business-tier appliance vs ~US$1.08M for 200 per-seat SaaS licences; ~19x cheaper per token vs metered frontier APIs; ~4x volume at equal spend — measured against actual client bills before any claim is made
- Proof: the founders' own companies run on the same systems, including Carbon Project Australia (an Australian R&D Tax Incentive software business)

## Pages
- [Home](https://omniscientai.io/): positioning, method (consult → build → measure), Omniscient Pulse morning briefs, the second brain knowledge graph, sovereignty model, FAQ, enquiry form
- [Appliance & pricing](https://omniscientai.io/appliance.html): the offer architecture, four tiers (Edge, Business, Enterprise, Regulated), commercial model, illustrative anchor numbers, what's in the box
- [Security architecture](https://omniscientai.io/security.html): default-deny egress, agent action tiering (GREEN/BLUE/RED), no vendor standing access, signed pull-only updates, tamper-evident ledger, Essential Eight alignment
- [Sovereign AI Melbourne](https://omniscientai.io/sovereign-ai-melbourne.html): what sovereign AI means, the three-question sovereignty test, who it's for (Australian mid-market), regulatory context
- [R&D Tax Incentive](https://omniscientai.io/ai-rd-tax-incentive.html): when AI adoption can qualify under Division 355 ITAA 1997, rates and deadlines, how the appliance ledger produces contemporaneous evidence; general information, not tax advice
- [Value model](https://omniscientai.io/assets/value-calculator.html): editable ROI/capacity model with published assumptions
- [Privacy policy](https://omniscientai.io/privacy.html)
